word: H6001 - עָמֵל - ʻâmêl - aw-male' - That laboureth

sections.paragraph:
Original: עמל

Transliteration: ‛âmêl

Phonetic: aw-male'

BDB Definition:

  1. labourer, sufferer, wretched one (noun masculine)
    1. labourer, workman
    2. sufferer
  2. toiling (adjectival verb)

Origin: from H5998

TWOT entry: 1639b,1639c

Part(s) of speech:
